content.en:
Ye Tian took a look at the information provided by the Divine Blade Alliance about Allah of the Yan Dao, and quickly learned some general information.

It turned out that Allah of Yandao was an internal member of the Divine Blade Alliance, cultivated by the Divine Blade Alliance, and his talent was only at the Zew level, and his achievements in his life could only reach the peak realm of the galaxy level, and he could not step into the realm of the cosmic gods.

And the galaxy level and the cosmic god realm seem to be only one realm apart, but it is a world-shaking gap!

Once you become a cosmic god, your lifespan is on par with the universe, and you can be regarded as immortal.

However, the galaxy level has a lifespan limit, even if a human becomes an immortal race, and the galaxy level of the immortal clan can only live for tens of millions of years.

All the powerhouses who can step into the galaxy level, who doesn't want to impact the cosmic god?

Therefore, Allah also wants to impact the cosmic god realm.

Under one opportunity, Allah of the Yan Dao greedily inked a batch of resources, including a supreme treasure that could make his talent rise against the sky, and three Heavenly Dao texts of the Sword.

In order to covet these resources, Allah of the Yan Dao also killed several stars of the Divine Blade Alliance.

And because of this incident, the Divine Blade Alliance suffered heavy losses, because those resources were not owned by the Divine Blade Alliance itself, but were used for trading, but were intercepted by Allah of the Yan Blade.

Therefore, the Divine Blade Alliance was furious.

But because Allah is very clever in preparing the Yan Dao, he also has a treasure that can shield the supreme deduction.

It is precisely because it is impossible to deduce the location of Allah of the Burning Knife, so far it is impossible to find Allah of the Burning Knife.

But the Divine Blade Alliance is a supreme-level force after all, and after careful investigation, it was found that Allah of the Flame Blade had returned to the domain.

Because Yandao Allah is one of the five hegemon-level forces in the Panchao - the younger brother of the Sword Feather God Lord of the Sword Emperor Sect, because he was a member of the Sword Emperor Sect, just because he was good at sword skills and was not suitable for the Sword Emperor Sect, he left the Panyu and worked hard step by step to become a member of the Divine Blade Alliance.

However, Allah of the Yan Dao did not have a high status in the Divine Blade Alliance, and almost did not know the territory, and even the other overlord-level forces in the region did not know that the Sword Emperor Sect had such a background.

"Sword Feather Divine Master, acquaintance! This new cosmic god almost offended me in the first place. I didn't expect to arrest his younger brother this time!" Ye Tian was quite surprised.

From the intelligence, the Divine Blade Alliance also secretly sent people to the Sword Emperor Sect, but unfortunately nothing was found, and it seemed that Allah of the Yan Sword did not return to the Sword Emperor Sect.

And it is impossible for the Divine Blade Alliance to send a cosmic god to wait in the Sword Emperor Sect all the time, which is unrealistic, so this mission was issued.

After understanding this, Ye Tian and his wife said that they returned to the area alone.

Through the teleportation stone gate, Ye Tian instantly came to the teleportation stone gate of the Hengpan Continent.

Hengpan Continent.

After Ye Tian came here, he immediately contacted the Immortal War Master.

Soon, Ye Tian met with the Immortal War Master.

Undead Legion Headquarters.

"His Royal Highness Wanfa, no, it should be called Wanfa Zhenjun, congratulations on stepping into the galaxy level, and it is not far off to become a cosmic god in the future!"

The Undead Lord congratulated.

"Where, it's too early for me to break through to the Cosmic God!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

The Immortal War Master also knew that it was impossible for a genius like Ye Tian to attack the Cosmic God so quickly, otherwise it would be a waste of his potential.

But he also knew very well that if Ye Tian was willing, he would be able to impact the Universe God Realm in a short period of time.

Therefore, he would not regard Ye Tian as a small galaxy level.

"Wanfa True Monarch, you are now at the galaxy level, you must have left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, could it be that you came back this time to develop in the Domain?" asked the Undead Army Lord curiously.

"That's not it!" Ye Tian waved his hand, "I have already established a force called Tiange, which is currently in the Sacred Domain Tianlan Giant City, so I will not return to the Pan Domain to develop, but use the Sacred Domain as the development area. Moreover, I am now registered as a member of the Supreme Force Divine Blade Alliance, which is more free. With my character, if I choose to join other supreme-level forces, I'm afraid it's a little unsuitable!"

"I see, why did the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch come to the domain this time?"

The undead warlord was curious.

"Has the undead army lord heard of Allah of the Flame Sword?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yandao Allah!" the undead military lord pondered for a while and said, "Could it be the younger brother of the Sword Feather God Lord?" but I am not from the same era as him, so I don't know much about him. Could it be that Your Highness has come to the Pandi for the sake of Allah of the Yan Dao?"

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded, "Yandao Allah defected to the Divine Blade Alliance, which made the Divine Blade Alliance angry, so it issued a mission to capture Yandao Allah. I also took the task this time, and this is when I entered the disk!"

"No wonder there have been some new faces in the enclosure recently, there are galaxy-level and galaxy-level, and they are all entrenched in some areas near the Sword Emperor Sect, although I learned the news before, I was not very interested in galaxy-level and galaxy-level things, so I didn't pay much attention to it. "The undead army is in charge.

Immediately, Ye Tian told the undead army master some basic information.

In the Domain, he had almost no power, and those people on the Earth were too weak in cultivation to be of any use at all.

Moreover, this is the Ganges River system of the Domain, and the Sword Emperor Sect is a new overlord-level force, so it must rely on the help of the undead army lord to facilitate the situation.

Besides, although he has left the supreme hall of the human race, he is still the envoy of the town.

As the emissary of the town, the undead legion will still cooperate with him, unless the undead legion wants to offend him, the emissary of the town.

The undead army master is not stupid, so naturally he will not deliberately offend Ye Tian.

Knowing the basic situation, the undead army master said: "Wanfa True Monarch, how do you want me to help?" You also said that even the people of the Divine Blade Alliance sneaked into the Sword Emperor Sect, but they did not find the Yan Dao Allah, and the other party is very likely not in the Sword Emperor Sect. Therefore, it is also difficult for me to find Allah of the Burning Sword. "

"Undead Army Lord, I want you to help hold an auction and invite the heads of the five hegemon-level forces and some big figures to participate, and I will try to see if I can attract Allah of the Yan Dao to it." "

Ye Tiandao.

"If Allah is not stupid, he probably won't participate. "

The undead are the main way.

"Allah of Yandao may not participate, but if someone auctions the treasure for Allah of Yandao, then it will definitely be connected with Allah of Yandao. In that case, there is hope to find out the traces of Allah of the Burning Sword. Moreover, even if you can't find Allah of the Yan Dao, you won't lose money at all by holding an auction!" Ye Tiandao.

"That's right, but it's not so easy to come up with a treasure that attracts Allah of the Yan Dao, the other party used to be an insider of the Divine Blade Alliance after all, and he coveted a number of resources, and his net worth is very rich!"

"Undead military master, I'll bring out these treasures!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly and said.

At this moment, Ye Tian took out a treasure, which was a knife weapon.

"It's ...... Origin Artifact! And it's the best Origin Knife Weapon!"

The undead army lord was quite surprised.

However, although such a weapon is attractive to Allah of the Flame Sword, it has not yet reached the point of madness.

Then, Ye Tian took out a second treasure.

Ye Tian's second treasure was the Chaos Rare Earth, and that small piece of Rare Earth was filled with extremely rich Chaos Yuan Qi and Chaos Law.

"Chaos Rare Earth, Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch, you even have such a treasure?"

The undead army lord looked at Ye Tian in shock and said.
